source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
re-mem'-brans (cepher zikkdron, "book of record"): Is related in meaning to the "Book of Life." It refers to a list of the righteous, recorded in a book that lies before God (Mal 3:16; compare Da 7:10).

See BOOK OF LIFE.

�
